# Chromission

> Chromission (크로미션) is a daily photo-mission app. Each day you receive a random
> mission across five categories — color, object, place, brand, typography — shoot up
> to nine photos, and assemble them into a 9-cell grid diary. Free, iOS & Android.

## Key facts
- Category: daily photo / photo-challenge app (Lifestyle)
- Platforms: iOS, Android
- Price: free (rewarded-ad re-roll, no purchase required)
- Languages: Korean, English
- Operator: 원동규 — contact haghl980813@gmail.com

## Pages
- Home (KO): https://chromission.com/
- Home (EN): https://chromission.com/en/
- Privacy (KO): https://chromission.com/privacy.html
- Privacy (EN): https://chromission.com/en/privacy.html
- Terms (KO): https://chromission.com/terms.html
- Terms (EN): https://chromission.com/en/terms.html

## Get the app
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6758727566
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.photo.chromission
